configurationSnapshot.description: Profile and mappings at time of execution

schedule.description: Cron expression or interval (e.g., "0 0 * * *" or "5 minutes")

parentRecordId.description: ID of the parent import profile this mapping belongs to

sourceField.description: Column name in the import file

targetField.description: Field name on the target model

isUniqueIdentifier.description: Use this field to identify existing records

dataType.description: Data type of the source field. Links to the dynamic fieldTypes model (V20260526.1). defaultValue is a key string that the runtime resolves to the linked record _id (see dynamic-route-service.applyDefaultValues). Persists dataTypeId + dataTypeKey for listings and filters.

dataTypeKey.description: Human-readable field type key (fieldTypes.key). Written alongside dataType link via denormalizeKey.

defaultValue.description: Default value if source field is empty

conflictResolution.description: How to handle conflicts for this field: overwrite (CSV wins), keepExisting (DB wins), inherit (use profile default)

valueSource.description: Where the value comes from. Links to Core.fieldMappingValueSources. Records persist denormalized valueSourceId + valueSourceKey.

targetFieldType.description: Type of the target model field. Links to Core.fieldTypes. Records persist denormalized targetFieldTypeId + targetFieldTypeKey.

targetLinkModel.description: For link-type target fields, the linked model. Records persist denormalized targetLinkModelId + targetLinkModelKey.

explicitValue.description: Explicit value to apply when valueSource is 'explicit'. For link targets, store { id, key }.

explicitDefaultLink.description: Explicit link default (e.g. Active, CSV / import). Options load from the target link model (targetLinkModelKey).

explicitContactType.description: Explicit lookup default for contacts.type (e.g. Primary). Shown when value source is Explicit and target field is type.

explicitContactSource.description: Explicit lookup default for contacts.source (e.g. CSV / import). Shown when value source is Explicit and target field is source.

schedule.description: Cron expression or interval (e.g., "0 0 * * *" or "5 minutes")

sftpConfig.remotePath.description: Remote directory path on SFTP server

customerId.description: External customer/realm id for vendors that need one (e.g. QuickBooks).

metadata.description: Free-form per-vendor metadata (e.g. Meta page access tokens keyed by page id).
